title: [Black Swan Castle, Ramparts]
description: Here the path along the ramparts becomes very difficult, with many gaps and missing stones.  On one side of the wall there are the dour and somber forms of the tower and keep, while on the other there is the delightful contrast of a beautiful vista of fields and meadows.  The juxtaposition is striking and diverting, but the occasional crumble of stone is a sharp reminder to watch where you place your feet.
